page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepLION is a deep multi-instance learning (MIL) method for identifying cancer-associated T cell receptors (TCRs) and detecting cancer samples using TCR-sequencing data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepLION is a deep multi-instance learning (MIL) method for identifying cancer-associated T cell receptors (TCRs) and detecting cancer samples using TCR-sequencing data.
